_fragment: Phase 7 (session0-polish) — Father Matthias and Abbey of Saint Prokop futureHook seeds. Not used Sunday; becomes accessible Session 1+.

abbey-of-saint-prokop.distance: two days south of Pallid Hart, past the black pines
abbey-of-saint-prokop.notes: Not used Sunday. Becomes accessible in Session 1+. Father Matthias has been negotiating with the Bagman for years — the Bagman stays quiet in the abbey because Matthias knows his true name, which he has never spoken to anyone living. The abbey sits on a hill overlooking a frozen creek. Thirty brothers, one abbot, one guest cleric (Matthias is not the abbot — he is the infirmarer). Graveyard holds markers for men who died in the region's older troubles.

father-matthias.personality: Blunt, pragmatic. Was a soldier before he took orders. Asks questions before he helps. Does not believe in unearned miracles. Kind in a plain, undramatic way.
father-matthias.voice: low, measured, slightly rough from a laryngeal wound he picked up during the Mongol incursion of 1241 which he does not talk about

relationships.vladislav: mutual-tolerance peace. Each knows what the other is. Matthias does not offer penance; Vladislav does not feed within a day's walk. Both have kept it.
relationships.gregor-koval: long-standing friendship — Gregor delivered harvest tithes to the abbey for thirty-two years. Matthias will feel Gregor's death personally.
relationships.bagman: Knows his true name. Has not spoken it in decades. The Bagman sleeps because Matthias is vigilant — the moment Matthias dies, the Bagman wakes for whoever holds the bag.

raiseDead.cost: 500 gp + diamond component, body within 10 days, non-undead target
raiseDead.conditions: Matthias may refuse if he judges the death was caused by the party's own stupidity twice. He will say so without softening.

reincarnate.cost: 1000 gp + rare herbs harvested at the treeline
reincarnate.notes: If the body is destroyed, the PC returns as a random race from the standard reincarnation table. Matthias warns about this with a straight face.

trueResurrection.cost: Not available here — requires a pilgrimage to Rome
trueResurrection.notes: Matthias will write a letter of introduction if the party is worth the ink.

father-matthias.scenarioCompatibility: NOT A DMPC. The party must travel to him. He does not travel with them. He has his own agenda — the region, the Houska entity, and the old equilibrium with Vladislav.
father-matthias.plannedIntroduction: Session 1 or 2, when the party reaches the abbey following Gregor's deathbed direction or Vladislav's dawn password.
father-matthias.fullActorFileTodo: Write config/actors/father-matthias.json post-Session-0. Cleric 12 Light domain, AC 18 (plate + shield), 104 HP, Spiritual Weapon/Spirit Guardians/Flame Strike in the spell list, relevant domain features. Not required Sunday.

matthiasRelationship.passwordForParty: Tell him Vladislav said his prayers still work
matthiasRelationship.notes: Duplicates state in fragment 05-vladislav. If both fragments merge the value wins according to alphabetical fragment order — 07 lands after 05 — but since they contain identical data either way is fine.
